narrative:
Precinct New London Village #2 (precinct in Huron County) has 674 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
